name: How long til I hear back on comp claim after reporting in Bountiful?

mainEntity.name: How long til I hear back on comp claim after reporting in Bountiful?

acceptedAnswer.text: Weeks typically; follow up and prepare for hearing if denied.[3]
acceptedAnswer.description: Utah insurers must respond promptly, but full adjudication can take weeks to months; denials lead to hearings.[3] Report starts clock.[1] Key factors: (1) Immediate report speeds; (2) Medicals delay if priors; (3) Disputes extend; (4) Track status.[1][3] Follow up weekly, document delays. Patience needed but persist.

description: Weeks typically; follow up and prepare for hearing if denied.[3]
